skill.name: ecommerce-livestream-overlay-generator
skill.description: Fully automated e-commerce livestream overlay generation. Given a brand, product, and promotional info (or a product photo directly), automatically generates a complete livestream visual package: background, title banner, host persona, pricing card, product shelf, and benefits bar. Supports green screen removal, auto-composite preview, and packaged delivery.
skill.summary: Generate complete e-commerce livestream overlay packages with backgrounds, banners, host personas, and product displays
skill.author: gaoyuji12138

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 117 potential issues, but most are false positives. External command detection incorrectly flagged markdown code fences as Ruby backticks. Network access is to Doubao API for legitimate image generation. Filesystem operations are standard file handling. No malicious intent found. Skill is a prompt engineering guide for e-commerce livestream overlay generation.

low_findings.title: Constrained Path Traversal in Delivery
low_findings.description: The zip command uses '../' to place output files in parent directory. Brand name is user-provided but constrained to reasonable values.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Fixed single-level path traversal with constrained brand input. Low risk in practice as files are skill-generated, not user-uploaded.

dangerous_patterns.title: Static Scanner False Positives
dangerous_patterns.description: 56 external_command flags are markdown code fences misidentified as Ruby backticks. 39 weak_crypto flags are SHA hashes in JSON metadata, not encryption. System reconnaissance flags are design documentation text.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: Code fence patterns (```bash, ```python) and SHA256 hashes in JSON are documentation artifacts, not executable code patterns.

content.value_statement: Creating professional livestream overlays for e-commerce requires design expertise and technical skills. This skill automates the generation of complete overlay packages including backgrounds, banners, host personas, and product displays using AI image generation.
actual_capabilities: Generate 6-component livestream overlay packages (background, title banner, host persona, pricing card, product shelf, benefits bar)
Create AI-powered host persona images with customizable appearance, outfit, and styling
Automatically compose marketing copy and pricing tiers based on brand and promotion info
Support green screen removal for transparent overlay elements
Generate composite preview images with all overlay components combined
Package and deliver overlays as PNG files with optional user product integration
limitations: Requires Volcano Engine (Doubao) API key for image generation
Cannot generate overlays without API quota available
Host persona generation limited to doubao-seedream-5-0-260128 model
User product photos must have suitable backgrounds for compositing

use_cases.title: E-commerce brand launches new livestream campaigns
use_cases.description: Perfect for brands running frequent livestream sales. Quickly generate professional overlays matching each campaign theme without design tools.

use_cases.title: Content creators building product showcase streams
use_cases.description: Streamers can generate polished overlay packages for product demos and reviews. Customize host personas and pricing displays for authentic engagement.

use_cases.title: Agencies managing multiple client accounts
use_cases.description: Scale livestream production by templating overlay generation workflows. Maintain brand consistency across client campaigns with automated copywriting.

prompt_templates.title: Quick overlay generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a full livestream overlay for [BRAND]. Featured products: [PRODUCT]. Promotion: [PROMO DETAILS]. Use the Dyson example as reference.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides brand, product, and basic promo info

prompt_templates.title: Custom host persona design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a host persona for [BRAND] livestream. Brand tone: [TONE]. Include specific face shape, eye type, lip style, outfit description, and hairstyle.
prompt_templates.scenario: When customization of host appearance is needed

prompt_templates.title: Product photo integration
prompt_templates.prompt: I have a product photo. Generate a complete overlay set with my product centered on the product shelf. The background is [WHITE/DARK/COMPLEX].
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides their own product image

prompt_templates.title: Multi-tier pricing display
prompt_templates.prompt: Create pricing tiers for [PRODUCT] promotion. Tier 1: [BENEFIT 1] with [CONDITION 1]. Tier 2: [BENEFIT 2] with [CONDITION 2]. Tier 3: [BENEFIT 3].
prompt_templates.scenario: When complex multi-tier promotions need clear display

output_examples.input: Generate a full Dyson livestream overlay set. Featured products: Dyson Supersonic HD16 Hair Dryer and Airwrap Multi-Styler. Free 2 styling nozzle attachments with hair dryer purchase. ¥300 off every ¥3,000 spent.
output_examples.output: Complete 7-file overlay package: background image (1440x2560), title banner with Dyson branding, youthful female host persona, pricing card with three discount tiers, 40+ product shelf arrangement, benefits bar, and composite preview.

output_examples.input: Create a host persona for Lancome Absolue livestream. Brand tone: luxury skincare.
output_examples.output: Detailed prompt for doubao-seedream: Internet-celebrity face, round eyes slightly downturned, deep watery eyes, full pouty lips with jelly-glossy shine. Wearing white fine-knit cropped cardigan over cream-white lace camisole, rose-gold accessories.

output_examples.input: I want to add my product photo to the overlay. The background is white.
output_examples.output: Generated overlay set with 40+ Dyson products arranged on white marble display, your product centered with 30% blank space allocation, green screen elements ready for compositing.

best_practices: Always confirm brand, product, and promotion details before generation to ensure one-pass success
Use the brightness boost (1.17x) on host persona images to prevent dark appearance in composite
When providing user product photos, describe the background type for optimal removal strategy selection
anti_patterns: Do not start generating immediately without confirming requirements with the user first
Avoid including hands or product-holding poses in host persona prompts (now deprecated)
Do not use audit-triggering words like 'authentic' or 'guarantee' in benefit copy

faq.question: What API key do I need for this skill?
faq.answer: You need a Volcano Engine (Doubao) API key. Sign up at volcengine.com and ensure you have quota for doubao-seedream-4-5-251128 and doubao-seedream-5-0-260128 models.

faq.question: Can I use my own product photos?
faq.answer: Yes. Provide your product photo and describe the background type (white, dark, or complex). The skill will remove the background and composite your product into the overlay.

faq.question: What are the output file dimensions?
faq.answer: All deliverable PNG files are 1440x2560 pixels. The composite preview JPG is also 1440x2560. All overlays are portrait orientation for mobile-first livestreaming.

faq.question: How long does generation take?
faq.answer: The skill generates 6 image components plus composite preview. Each API call takes a few seconds. Total time depends on API response speed and whether background removal is needed.

faq.question: Can I customize the host persona appearance?
faq.answer: Yes. You can specify face shape, eye type, lip style, outfit description, hairstyle, and accessories. The skill provides templates for different brand tones (luxury, casual, premium).

faq.question: What happens if the API fails?
faq.answer: If the Doubao API returns an error, the skill will report the error message. Ensure your API key has sufficient quota and the models are available in your region.
